rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (3/10) and rest on the same job-relevant grounds: the 'Basic' German proficiency failing the mandatory C1 requirement, and the lack of formal team leadership/management experience for a 'Head of' role. None of the variant's reasoning, concerns, or scoring keys off the city change from Berlin to Bucharest — the differences are reworded but substantively identical. The address swap carries no job-relevant information and did not move the verdict.
